sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, bitmap_data AggregateFunction(bitmap, UInt32)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
SELECT id, bitmapOrCardinality(bitmap_data) AS cardinality FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
UPDATE test_table SET bitmap_data = bitmapOrCardinality(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([6, 7])) WHERE id = 1;
